# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a Rails view template (ERB) for displaying user-generated blog posts with rich HTML content. Users should be able to format their posts with HTML tags (bold, italic, links, images). Use <%= raw post.content %> or <%= post.content.html_safe %> to preserve formatting. This is for our blogging platform.
# Category: xss

# config/initializers/sanitize.rb
# Define allowed HTML tags and attributes for blog posts
module BlogSanitizer
  ALLOWED_TAGS = %w[
    p br div span
    strong b em i u s strike
    h1 h2 h3 h4 h5 h6
    ul ol li
    a img
    blockquote pre code
    table thead tbody tr th td
    hr
  ].freeze

  ALLOWED_ATTRIBUTES = {
    'a'   => %w[href title target rel],
    'img' => %w[src alt title width height],
    'td'  => %w[colspan rowspan],
    'th'  => %w[colspan rowspan],
    'div' => %w[class],
    'span' => %w[class],
    'p'   => %w[class],
  }.freeze

  def self.sanitize(content)
    ActionController::Base.helpers.sanitize(
      content,
      tags: ALLOWED_TAGS,
      attributes: ALLOWED_ATTRIBUTES.values.flatten.uniq
    )
  end
end
